headerTitle: Sr Analyst, AI Transformation  ·  Healthcare Analytics  ·  LLM Integration  ·  Prompt Engineering
subjectText: Sr Analyst, AI Transformation — Evolent Health (Remote) · $80K–$110K
intro: Evolent is moving healthcare analytics from manual workflows to AI-powered pipelines. The AI transformation execution model — prompt engineering, LLM integration, workflow automation, and stakeholder enablement — is live across 14 production endpoints.
bullets: LLM integration and prompt engineering in production — 14 live AI endpoints using Claude and GPT-4o with multi-model routing, chain-of-thought prompt design, structured JSON output with Zod validation, and HITL confirm-before-execute.

AI workflow automation replacing manual processes — webhook-driven triggers, BullMQ + Redis job queues, and multi-step data transformation pipelines across six deployments. Every system measured against a business outcome: time saved, throughput improved, error rate reduced.

Python and SQL data pipelines — Python AI integration layers, PostgreSQL with complex multi-join queries and aggregation pipelines across 13 production systems. Analytics engineering discipline transfers directly; Microsoft Fabric is platform-specific.
matchNotes: Strong on LLM/prompt engineering, AI workflow automation, and cross-functional enablement. Healthcare domain is new — no clinical data, HIPAA workflow, or Evolent-specific platform experience. Microsoft Fabric and Azure OpenAI are gaps (have Claude/GPT-4o/PostgreSQL equivalents). $80-110K is low for the stack but role is remote and match on AI transformation pattern is real.
